name: react-native-iap
description: Open-source React Native in-app purchase library conforming to OpenIAP spec, using Nitro Modules for native bridging.

seo.title: react-native-iap — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: react-native-iap: Open-source React Native in-app purchase library conforming to OpenIAP spec, using Nitro Modules for native bridging.

when_to_use: Unified StoreKit 2 and Google Play Billing for React Native apps
Purchase restoration and receipt validation across platforms
Handling subscription lifecycle events in React Native via Nitro Modules

pros: Open-source RN IAP aligned with OpenIAP
Uses Nitro Modules for modern native bridging
Broad community adoption in RN ecosystem
Type-safe interfaces across iOS and Android
cons: Library, not a managed subscription service
Upgrades can require native linking work
Complex edge cases push many teams to RevenueCat
review.verdict: The default RN IAP library when you want to own the stack, but most teams still bolt RevenueCat on top eventually.
review.best_for: React Native teams that want to own IAP and validation in-house.
review.not_for: Teams that prefer a managed subscription backend.
